archimate:Representation.name: ISO 8601
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: ISO 8601 is an international standard that specifies the representation of dates, times, and durations. It provides a standardized format for expressing and exchanging date and time-related information in a universally accepted way. The ISO 8601 format follows the YYYY-MM-DD (year-month-day) pattern for dates and the HH:MM:SS (hour-minute-second) pattern for times. It also allows for additional elements such as time zone offsets and durations. ISO 8601 ensures consistency and interoperability in date and time representations, facilitating accurate data exchange, international communication, and proper handling of date and time-related operations across different systems and applications.
Publisher: ISO
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ISO8601Representation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ISO8601Representation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: ISO 8601 is an international standard that specifies the representation of dates, times, and durations. It provides a standardized format for expressing and exchanging date and time-related information in a universally accepted way. The ISO 8601 format follows the YYYY-MM-DD (year-month-day) pattern for dates and the HH:MM:SS (hour-minute-second) pattern for times. It also allows for additional elements such as time zone offsets and durations. ISO 8601 ensures consistency and interoperability in date and time representations, facilitating accurate data exchange, international communication, and proper handling of date and time-related operations across different systems and applications.
